subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: The party arrived at a 60-foot diameter chamber at the peak of the spire.
source_quote: The party arrives at a 60-foot diameter chamber at the peak of the spire

subject: teleportation circle
fact: A permanent teleportation circle in the peak chamber glows with sickly green energy.
source_quote: containing a permanent teleportation circle glowing with sickly green energy

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning Peak
fact: Poisonous clouds surround the teleportation circle, preventing flight.
source_quote: surrounded by poisonous clouds

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur begins a complex magical hacking process to recalibrate the teleportation circle.
source_quote: Felkur begins a complex magical hacking process to recalibrate a teleportation circle

subject: artificer tools
fact: Felkur uses his artificer tools to begin recalibrating the portal.
source_quote: Felkur uses his artificer tools

subject: collected crystals
fact: Felkur uses collected crystals to begin recalibrating the portal.
source_quote: and collected crystals to begin recalibrating the portal

subject: recalibration process
fact: The recalibration process requires intense concentration and multiple arcane successes over ten rounds.
source_quote: a process requiring intense concentration and multiple arcane successes over ten rounds

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim prepares to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein prepare to block the single iron door leading into the chamber

subject: Daein
fact: Daein prepares to block the single iron door leading into the chamber.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Daein prepare to block the single iron door leading into the chamber

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear sits on the floor hatch to prevent enemies from entering.
source_quote: The Owlbear sits on the floor hatch to prevent enemies from entering

subject: first phase completion
fact: Felkur successfully completes the first stages of the arcane recalibration.
source_quote: Felkur successfully completes the first stages of the arcane recalibration

subject: Veris
fact: High Inquisitor Veris is heard approaching the door with a stone golem.
source_quote: High Inquisitor Veris and a stone golem are heard approaching the door

subject: Veris
fact: Veris shouts threats of revenge.
source_quote: with Veris shouting threats of revenge

subject: stone golem
fact: The stone golem attempts to push open the door but is initially held back.
source_quote: The stone golem attempts to push open the door but is initially held back

subject: door breach order
fact: Veris commands the golem to tear the door off its hinges.
source_quote: Veris commands the golem to tear the door off its hinges

subject: second phase completion
fact: Felkur successfully navigates the second phase of the recalibration.
source_quote: successfully navigating the second phase of the recalibration

subject: Sanctuary
fact: Bramgrim casts Sanctuary on Felkur to shield him from direct attacks.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Sanctuary on Felkur to shield him from direct attacks

subject: Invisibility
fact: Daein uses a magical mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur.
source_quote: Daein uses a magical mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur hides behind a pillar while maintaining the portal's calibration.
source_quote: allowing the gnome to hide behind a pillar while maintaining the portal's calibration

subject: door destruction
fact: The stone golem smashes the door open.
source_quote: The stone golem smashes the door open

subject: Teleport
fact: Veris teleports into the room to confront the party.
source_quote: and Veris teleports into the room to confront the party

subject: failed shove attempt
fact: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct.
source_quote: Daein attempts to shove the stone golem but fails to move the massive construct

subject: Owlbear engagement
fact: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with magical claws.
source_quote: The Owlbear engages the stone golem in melee, striking it with magical claws

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim summons Spirit Guardians that swirl around the battlefield.
source_quote: Bramgrim summons Spirit Guardians that swirl around the battlefield

subject: Spirit Guardians damage
fact: Spirit Guardians damage both the golem and Veris.
source_quote: damaging both the golem and Veris

subject: eldritch cannon
fact: Felkur deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem.
source_quote: Felkur, remaining invisible, deploys his eldritch cannon to blast the stone golem

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the golem.
source_quote: Akritas uses Hunter's Mark on the golem

subject: Akritas attack
fact: Akritas strikes the golem with a well-aimed shot.
source_quote: and strikes it with a well-aimed shot

subject: Veris repositioning
fact: Veris teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage.
source_quote: Veris, furious over the party's forgery and intrusion, teleports across the chamber to gain a tactical advantage

subject: combat status
fact: The session ends mid-combat on round 4.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4

subject: portal collapse timer
fact: There are 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a formidable tower within the fire giant stronghold of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A formidable tower within the fire giant stronghold of Maerimydra

subject: party infiltration
fact: The party infiltrated the Spire by posing as merchants.
source_quote: The party infiltrated it by posing as merchants

subject: key theft
fact: The party stole a key during a tense dinner.
source_quote: stole a key during a tense dinner

subject: vault access
fact: The party used the stolen key to access the lift and vault within.
source_quote: and used it to access the lift and vault within

subject: The Glyph Corridor
fact: The Glyph Corridor is a 50-foot long hallway within the Spire.
source_quote: A 50-foot long hallway within the Spire

subject: glyph traps
fact: The floor tiles in the Glyph Corridor are rigged with explosive glyphs of warding on prime-numbered tiles.
source_quote: where the floor tiles are rigged with explosive glyphs of warding on prime-numbered tiles

subject: The Vault of the Spire
fact: The Vault of the Spire is a 30-foot by 30-foot chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit.
source_quote: A 30-foot by 30-foot chamber kept at a constant 55 degrees Fahrenheit

subject: infernal contracts
fact: The Vault of the Spire is lined with shelves of infernal contracts.
source_quote: lined with shelves of infernal contracts

subject: soul coins
fact: The Vault of the Spire contains soul coins.
source_quote: and soul coins

subject: infernal ledgers
fact: The Vault of the Spire contains infernal ledgers.
source_quote: and infernal ledgers

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a central pedestal under a crystal dome in the vault.
source_quote: The Lexicon of Oaths rested on a central pedestal under a crystal dome

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is an Arcanoloth who hosted the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: An Arcanoloth who hosted the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: scent usage
fact: Vraxen's personal scent was used to bypass the vault's stone golem guardian.
source_quote: His personal scent was used to bypass the vault's stone golem guardian

subject: Vraxen's Personal Journal
fact: Vraxen's personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors was discovered in the vault.
source_quote: and his personal journal detailing plans to betray his Yugoloth superiors was discovered in the vault

subject: Veperyd
fact: Veperyd is a fire giant who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A fire giant who attended the dinner at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Veperyd confrontation
fact: Veperyd was drawn into the three-way confrontation that allowed the party to escape.
source_quote: and was drawn into the three-way confrontation that allowed the party to escape

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is the High Inquisitor of Mulmaster.
source_quote: The High Inquisitor of Mulmaster

subject: Veris hunting
fact: Veris is secretly hunting Felkur.
source_quote: secretly hunting Felkur

subject: Veris forgery
fact: Veris's name was forged into the Lexicon of Oaths by Felkur to frame him for the theft of a priceless artifact.
source_quote: His name was forged into the Lexicon of Oaths by Felkur to frame him for the theft of a priceless artifact

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear is the party's sidekick.
source_quote: The party's sidekick

subject: Owlbear distraction
fact: The Owlbear caused a distraction by jumping on the magical table during the dinner.
source_quote: who caused a distraction by jumping on the magical table during the dinner

subject: Owlbear scent pickup
fact: The Owlbear inadvertently picked up Vraxen's scent during the dinner.
source_quote: inadvertently picking up Vraxen's scent

subject: Limping Oric
fact: Limping Oric is a fence based in Daggerford.
source_quote: A fence based in Daggerford

subject: brooch sale
fact: Limping Oric purchased a stolen brooch from a drunken Felkur years ago.
source_quote: who purchased a stolen brooch from a drunken Felkur years ago

subject: Limping Oric memory loss
fact: Due to the brooch's magic, Limping Oric could not remember who sold it to him.
source_quote: Due to the brooch's magic, he could not remember who sold it to him

subject: Obsidian Table Key
fact: Daein stole the Obsidian Table Key from an obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire.
source_quote: A key stolen by Daein from an obsidian table during the dinner at the Spire

subject: lift access
fact: The Obsidian Table Key was used to grant access to the spire's lift and ultimately the vault.
source_quote: used to grant access to the spire's lift and ultimately the vault

subject: Thieves' Tools
fact: Felkur used Thieves' Tools to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door.
source_quote: A set of specialized tools used by Felkur to bypass the lift mechanism and unlock the vault door

subject: no trace tampering
fact: Felkur's use of Thieves' Tools left no trace of tampering.
source_quote: with exceptional skill that left no trace of tampering

subject: Scent Extractor
fact: The Scent Extractor is a specialized mechanism among Felkur's gadgets originally designed to extract flavors.
source_quote: A specialized mechanism among Felkur's gadgets, originally designed to extract flavors to avoid spicy food

subject: scent extraction
fact: The Scent Extractor was repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur.
source_quote: Repurposed to extract Vraxen's scent from the Owlbear's fur to fool the stone golem guardian

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light.
source_quote: A massive tome bound in devilhide with pages made from processed souls glowing with inner light

subject: Lexicon updates
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths automatically updates with all infernal contracts.
source_quote: It automatically updates with all infernal contracts

subject: Lexicon alteration
fact: Felkur altered the Lexicon of Oaths entries to replace his name with Veris's.
source_quote: Felkur altered its entries to replace his name with Veris's

subject: Phantom Thief entry
fact: Felkur added a new entry to the Lexicon of Oaths attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: and add a new entry attributing the theft to the Phantom Thief

subject: Priceless Brooch
fact: The Priceless Brooch is a powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra.
source_quote: A powerful artifact belonging to the high priests of Maerimydra

subject: brooch theft
fact: Felkur stole the Priceless Brooch while drunk.
source_quote: Felkur stole it while drunk

subject: brooch sale price
fact: Felkur sold the Priceless Brooch to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces.
source_quote: and sold it to Limping Oric for 45 gold pieces

subject: brooch location magic
fact: The Priceless Brooch possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located.
source_quote: It possesses a special ability that makes the bearer impervious to being located

subject: Phantom Thief origin
fact: Felkur accidentally activated the brooch's magic, leading to him becoming known as the Phantom Thief.
source_quote: which Felkur accidentally activated, leading to him becoming known as the Phantom Thief

subject: Soul Coins
fact: Soul Coins are currency found within the vault representing captured souls used in infernal transactions.
source_quote: Currency found within the vault, representing captured souls used in infernal transactions

subject: Soulcoin Ledger
fact: The Soulcoin Ledger is a record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra found by the party in the vault.
source_quote: A record of all soulcoin transactions in Maerimydra, found by the party in the vault

subject: blackmail material
fact: The Soulcoin Ledger was noted as valuable blackmail material.
source_quote: and noted as valuable blackmail material

subject: Faerzess Shard
fact: Felkur stole a large, pure Faerzess Shard from the vault.
source_quote: A large, pure crystal stolen from the vault by Felkur

subject: Faerzess Shard effect
fact: The Faerzess Shard enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day.
source_quote: It enhances an artificer's abilities, acting similarly to a wand of the mage with a limited number of charges per day

subject: Blank Infernal Contracts
fact: Blank Infernal Contracts found in the vault could be used to bind devils.
source_quote: Blank contracts found in the vault that could be used to bind devils

subject: contract removal
fact: Blank Infernal Contracts were taken by a party member.
source_quote: taken by a party member

subject: Arcane Crystals
fact: Arcane Crystals are blue, white, and green crystals collected earlier.
source_quote: Blue, white, and green crystals collected earlier

subject: crystal usage
fact: Felkur used the Arcane Crystals to recalibrate the teleportation circle.
source_quote: and used by Felkur to recalibrate the teleportation circle

subject: crystal buffer
fact: The Arcane Crystals provided additional time in case concentration was lost.
source_quote: providing additional time in case concentration was lost

subject: Magical Mandolin
fact: Daein used a Magical Mandolin to cast Invisibility on Felkur.
source_quote: An instrument used by Daein to cast Invisibility on Felkur

subject: mandolin concealment
fact: The Magical Mandolin concealed Felkur from Veris and the stone golem during the portal room battle.
source_quote: concealing him from Veris and the stone golem during the portal room battle

subject: Eldritch Cannon
fact: Felkur deployed an Eldritch Cannon that fires blasts of energy at enemies.
source_quote: A magical device deployed by Felkur that fires blasts of energy at enemies

subject: cannon deployment timing
fact: Felkur deployed the Eldritch Cannon while he maintained concentration on the portal recalibration.
source_quote: while he maintains concentration on the portal recalibration

subject: True Seeing
fact: Bramgrim cast True Seeing to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim to reveal the hidden magical glyphs on the floor tiles in the corridor

subject: glyph navigation
fact: True Seeing allowed the party to identify the pattern of the traps and navigate safely.
source_quote: allowing the party to identify the pattern of the traps and navigate safely

subject: vault trap check
fact: True Seeing was used to confirm the vault chamber was free of traps.
source_quote: Also used to confirm the vault chamber was free of traps

subject: Glyph of Warding
fact: Glyphs of Warding are magical traps placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault.
source_quote: Magical traps placed on the prime-numbered floor tiles of the corridor leading to the vault

subject: glyph explosion trigger
fact: The Glyphs of Warding are designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals.
source_quote: designed to explode if stepped upon by unauthorized individuals

subject: Sanctuary
fact: Bramgrim cast Sanctuary on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks.
source_quote: Cast by Bramgrim on Felkur to prevent enemies from targeting him with direct melee attacks

subject: Sanctuary duration
fact: Sanctuary protected Felkur while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle.
source_quote: while he concentrated on recalibrating the teleportation circle

subject: Invisibility
fact: Daein cast Invisibility via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem.
source_quote: Cast by Daein via a magical mandolin to hide Felkur from Veris and the stone golem

subject: Invisibility utility
fact: Invisibility allowed Felkur to work on the portal from behind a pillar without being directly targeted.
source_quote: allowing him to work on the portal from behind a pillar without being directly targeted

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim summoned Spirit Guardians at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits.
source_quote: Summoned by Bramgrim at fifth level to create a protective area of spectral spirits

subject: Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas used Hunter's Mark to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry.
source_quote: Used by Akritas to magically mark the stone golem as her quarry

subject: Hunter's Mark damage
fact: Hunter's Mark deals additional damage with Akritas's attacks against the stone golem.
source_quote: dealing additional damage with her attacks against it

subject: Teleport
fact: Veris employed Teleport to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber during combat.
source_quote: Employed by Veris to instantly reposition himself within the portal chamber during combat

subject: Teleport tactical advantage
fact: Teleport gave Veris a tactical advantage against the party.
source_quote: gaining a tactical advantage against the party

subject: stone golem
fact: A stone golem is a massive, magically immune guardian stationed before the vault door.
source_quote: A massive, magically immune guardian stationed before the vault door

subject: golem access rule
fact: The vault's stone golem is programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent.
source_quote: programmed to only allow passage to those carrying Vraxen's scent

subject: second stone golem
fact: A second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber.
source_quote: A second stone golem accompanied Veris to the portal chamber

subject: second golem breach
fact: The second stone golem smashed through the door to the portal chamber.
source_quote: smashing through the door

subject: second golem combat
fact: The second stone golem engaged the party in combat.
source_quote: and engaging the party in combat

subject: portal recalibration
fact: The portal recalibration is ongoing with 6 rounds remaining before collapse.
source_quote: with 6 more rounds remaining before the portal collapses

subject: Veris pursuit
fact: Veris is pursuing the party to the top of the spire, furious over the forgery.
source_quote: He pursues the party to the top of the spire, furious over the forgery

subject: combat outcome
fact: The confrontation with Veris and the stone golem is unresolved as the session ended mid-combat.
source_quote: The session ends mid-combat on round 4
